children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Of the amounts remaining after the allocation of funds for the purposes set forth under sections 12110, 12111, and 12109 of this title, the Attorney General shall, from amounts authorized to be appropriated under paragraph (1) for each fiscal year, distribute 50 percent for incarceration grants under , and 50 percent for incentive grants under .section 12103 of this titlesection 12104 of this title

children.heading: Distribution of minimum amounts
children.label: B Distribution of minimum amounts
children.text: The Attorney General shall distribute minimum amounts allocated for to an eligible State not later than 30 days after receiving an application that demonstrates that such State qualifies for a Violent Offender Incarceration grant under or a Truth-in-Sentencing Incentive grant under .section 12103(a) of this titlesection 12103 of this titlesection 12104 of this title

children.heading: Uses of funds
children.label: 1 Uses of funds
children.text: Except as provided in section 12110 and 12111 of this title, funds made available pursuant to this section shall be used only to carry out the purposes described in .1section 12102(a) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “sections”.1

children.heading: Nonsupplanting requirement
children.label: 2 Nonsupplanting requirement
children.text: Funds made available pursuant to this section shall not be used to supplant State funds, but shall be used to increase the amount of funds that would, in the absence of Federal funds, be made available from State sources.

children.label: B
children.text: research and evaluation, including assessment of the effect on public safety and other effects of the expansion of correctional capacity and sentencing reforms implemented pursuant to this part;

children.label: C
children.text: technical assistance relating to the use of grant funds, and development and implementation of sentencing reforms implemented pursuant to this part; and

children.label: D
children.text: data collection and improvement of information systems relating to the confinement of violent offenders and other sentencing and correctional matters.

children.heading: Carryover of appropriations
children.label: 4 Carryover of appropriations
children.text: Funds appropriated pursuant to this section during any fiscal year shall remain available until expended. Funds obligated, but subsequently unspent and deobligated, may remain available, to the extent as may provided in appropriations Acts, for the purpose described in for any subsequent fiscal year. The further obligation of such funds by an official for such purpose shall not be delayed, directly or indirectly, in any manner by any officer or employee in the executive branch.2section 12102(a)(4) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be followed by “be”.2

children.heading: Matching funds
children.label: 5 Matching funds
children.text: The Federal share of a grant received under this part may not exceed 90 percent of the costs of a proposal as described in an application approved under this part.
